This is a story without any chapter headings.
It flows continuously from beginning to end.
There are no markers to split on.

The narrative continues without interruption.
Every paragraph blends into the next.
This is deliberate for testing the fallback mechanism.

We need enough content here to ensure that when
the fallback to equal-size chunks kicks in, we
get multiple meaningful chunks rather than a
single monolithic block.

So let me keep writing more sentences until
there is sufficient text to split into at least
three or four chunks of reasonably equal size.
